/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/measdocxml.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmeasdocxml.so -o libmeasdocxml.so CMakeFiles/measdocxml.dir/measdocxml_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/measdocxml.dir/measdocxml.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libxml/tinyxml2:" /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 ../tinyxml2/libtinyxml2.so
